Class Version1GA

java.lang.Object
GeneticAlgorithm
Version1GA
All Implemented Interfaces:
Subject
public class Version1GA
extends GeneticAlgorithm
Version 1 will use roulette wheel selection and 1 point crossover.
Author:
Burhan ELGUN

  • Field Summary

    Fields inherited from class GeneticAlgorithm

    chromosomes, isPaused, isStopped, localMaxiumChromosome, observers

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors 
    Constructor Description
    Version1GA()
    Initializes the selection and cross over behaviors with roulette wheel selection and 1 point cross over

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type Method Description
    java.util.ArrayList<Chromosome> crossover​(java.util.ArrayList<Chromosome> chromosomes)
    This method makes 1 point cross over
    java.util.ArrayList<Chromosome> selection​(java.util.ArrayList<Chromosome> chromosomes)
    This method makes roulette wheel selection

    • selection

      public java.util.ArrayList<Chromosome> selection​(java.util.ArrayList<Chromosome> chromosomes)
